aws.name: CloudTrail enabled in all regions
aws.remediation: Create a multi-region CloudTrail trail to capture all API activity.

aws.name: CloudTrail log file validation enabled
aws.remediation: Enable log file validation on all CloudTrail trails.

aws.name: CloudTrail logs retained for at least 365 days
aws.expected: CloudTrail S3 bucket retains logs for minimum 365 days
aws.remediation: Configure S3 lifecycle policy to retain CloudTrail logs for at least 365 days.

aws.name: CloudTrail data events enabled for S3 and Lambda
aws.expected: Data events enabled for S3 object-level operations and Lambda invocations
aws.remediation: Enable CloudTrail data events for S3 and Lambda.

azure.name: Azure Activity Log retention configured
azure.expected: Activity Log sent to Log Analytics workspace with 365+ day retention
azure.remediation: Configure diagnostic settings to send Activity Log to Log Analytics with 365-day retention.

azure.name: Azure AD audit logs retained
azure.expected: Azure AD audit logs exported to long-term storage
azure.remediation: Configure Azure AD diagnostic settings to export audit logs to Log Analytics or Storage.

azure.name: Resource diagnostic settings enabled
azure.expected: Diagnostic settings enabled for all critical resources
azure.remediation: Enable diagnostic settings for all resources processing CUI.

gcp.name: Admin Activity audit logs active
gcp.expected: Admin Activity audit logs are enabled (always on)
gcp.remediation: Admin Activity logs are enabled by default and cannot be disabled.

gcp.name: Data Access audit logs enabled
gcp.expected: Data Access audit logs enabled for all services
gcp.remediation: Enable Data Access audit logs in the project IAM policy.

gcp.name: Audit log sink to long-term storage
gcp.expected: Log sink configured to export audit logs to Cloud Storage with 365+ day retention
gcp.remediation: Create a log sink to export audit logs to Cloud Storage with appropriate retention.

aws.name: CloudTrail records user identity
aws.expected: CloudTrail captures userIdentity for all API calls
aws.remediation: Ensure CloudTrail is properly configured to capture full user identity information.

aws.name: No shared IAM user accounts
aws.expected: Each IAM user maps to a single individual (no shared accounts)
aws.remediation: Replace shared IAM accounts with individual user accounts.

azure.name: Azure AD sign-in logs available
azure.expected: Sign-in logs capture individual user identities for all authentications
azure.remediation: Ensure Azure AD sign-in logging is active and retained.

gcp.name: Audit logs include principal identity
gcp.expected: All audit log entries include principalEmail for user attribution
gcp.remediation: Verify audit logs include complete principal identity information.

3.3.3.manual_guidance: Review audit logging configuration to verify events of interest are captured. Check for a documented process to periodically review and update which events are logged based on current threat landscape, organizational changes, and incident findings.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: a process for determining when to review logged events is defined.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that a process for determining when to review logged events are defined.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: event types being logged are reviewed in accordance with the defined review process.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide evidence of periodic review: event types being logged are reviewed in accordance with the defined review process.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: event types being logged are updated based on the review.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: event types being logged are updated based on the review.

aws.name: CloudWatch alarm for CloudTrail logging changes
aws.expected: Alarm exists for CloudTrail configuration changes
aws.remediation: Create CloudWatch alarm for CloudTrail StopLogging and DeleteTrail events.

aws.name: SNS topic configured for audit failure notifications
aws.expected: SNS topic with active subscriptions for audit failure alerts
aws.remediation: Configure SNS notifications for audit logging failure alerts.

azure.name: Activity log alert for diagnostic settings changes
azure.expected: Alert configured for changes to diagnostic settings
azure.remediation: Create Activity Log alert for diagnostic settings modifications.

gcp.name: Alert policy for log sink changes
gcp.expected: Alert policy exists for changes to log sinks and audit configuration
gcp.remediation: Create an alerting policy for modifications to logging configuration.

aws.name: AWS Security Hub enabled
aws.expected: Security Hub enabled with findings aggregation active
aws.remediation: Enable AWS Security Hub for centralized security finding correlation.

aws.name: CloudTrail integrated with CloudWatch Logs
aws.remediation: Configure CloudTrail to deliver logs to CloudWatch Logs for real-time analysis.

azure.name: Microsoft Sentinel enabled
azure.expected: Microsoft Sentinel workspace deployed and connected to data sources
azure.remediation: Deploy Microsoft Sentinel and connect relevant data sources.

gcp.name: Security Command Center enabled
gcp.expected: Security Command Center Premium tier enabled
gcp.remediation: Enable Security Command Center Premium for centralized security analysis.

aws.name: CloudWatch Logs Insights available
aws.expected: CloudTrail log group exists in CloudWatch Logs for query access
aws.remediation: Configure CloudTrail log delivery to CloudWatch Logs for Insights queries.

aws.name: Athena table configured for CloudTrail analysis
aws.expected: Athena table exists for CloudTrail log analysis
aws.remediation: Create Athena table over CloudTrail S3 bucket for ad-hoc analysis.

azure.name: Log Analytics workspace configured
azure.expected: Log Analytics workspace deployed with audit data ingestion
azure.remediation: Deploy Log Analytics workspace and configure audit log ingestion.

gcp.name: Log Analytics enabled in Cloud Logging
gcp.expected: Log buckets configured with analytics enabled for audit data
gcp.remediation: Enable Log Analytics on log buckets for SQL-based querying.

aws.name: NTP configured on EC2 instances
aws.expected: Amazon Time Sync Service or NTP configured on all instances
aws.remediation: Configure Amazon Time Sync Service (169.254.169.123) on all EC2 instances.

azure.name: Azure VMs use platform time sync
azure.expected: VMs use Azure platform time synchronization
azure.remediation: Verify Azure VMs use the platform-provided time synchronization service.

gcp.name: GCE instances use Google NTP
gcp.remediation: Configure GCE instances to use Google-provided NTP (metadata.google.internal).

aws.name: CloudTrail S3 bucket has access logging
aws.expected: Server access logging enabled on CloudTrail S3 bucket
aws.remediation: Enable S3 server access logging on the CloudTrail log bucket.

aws.name: CloudTrail S3 bucket encrypted
aws.expected: SSE-KMS encryption enabled on CloudTrail S3 bucket
aws.remediation: Enable SSE-KMS encryption on the CloudTrail log bucket.

aws.name: CloudTrail S3 bucket MFA Delete enabled
aws.expected: MFA Delete enabled on CloudTrail S3 bucket
aws.remediation: Enable MFA Delete on the CloudTrail log bucket.

azure.name: Log Analytics workspace access controlled
azure.expected: Access control mode set to require workspace or resource permissions
azure.remediation: Configure workspace access control to use resource-context or workspace-context permissions.

azure.name: Audit log storage uses immutable blobs
azure.expected: Immutability policy configured on audit log storage containers
azure.remediation: Configure immutable blob storage for audit log containers.

gcp.name: Audit log bucket has retention policy
gcp.expected: Retention policy with lock enabled on audit log bucket
gcp.remediation: Configure and lock a retention policy on the audit log Cloud Storage bucket.

gcp.name: Audit log bucket access restricted
gcp.expected: Only authorized principals have access to audit log bucket
gcp.remediation: Restrict IAM bindings on the audit log bucket to authorized security personnel only.

aws.name: CloudTrail management restricted to security team
aws.expected: CloudTrail management permissions limited to security/audit roles only
aws.remediation: Restrict cloudtrail:* permissions to dedicated security/audit IAM roles.

aws.name: SCP prevents non-security users from modifying audit config
aws.expected: SCP restricts audit configuration changes to security OU
aws.remediation: Create SCP to prevent non-security accounts from modifying audit configuration.

azure.name: Diagnostic settings management restricted
azure.expected: Monitoring Contributor role assigned only to security/audit personnel
azure.remediation: Restrict Monitoring Contributor and Log Analytics Contributor roles to security team.

gcp.name: Logging admin role restricted
gcp.expected: roles/logging.admin granted only to security/audit service accounts
gcp.remediation: Restrict Logging Admin role to authorized security personnel only.
